name: Islam Kathat
bio: Passionate developer focused on AI/ML, intelligent systems, and next-generation applications. I build AI-powered products and use full-stack and mobile technologies as supporting tools to deliver scalable solutions with thoughtful design and real-world impact.

projects.title: RAG System
projects.description: Full-stack Retrieval-Augmented Generation system using FastAPI, ChromaDB, and LLaMA 3.1 via Ollama. Integrated SearXNG web search, Trafilatura scraping, multi-format document ingestion, Sentence Transformers embeddings, overlapping chunking, and cross-encoder re-ranking for accurate real-time retrieval.

projects.title: MNIST Digit Classifier
projects.description: Built multiple digit classification models including MLP, SelectKBest-optimized model, and CNN with BatchNorm achieving 90%+ accuracy. Implemented training optimization techniques, EDA, and performance validation using confusion matrices and classification reports.

projects.title: CIFAR-10 Object Classifier
projects.description: Designed multiple image classification architectures including CNN (92%), ResNet (95%), and EfficientNetV2B0 transfer learning (97%). Applied MixUp, CutMix, Cutout augmentation techniques and exported production-ready models.

projects.title: CarBike4U
projects.description: Automobile marketplace platform built with a microservices architecture. Implemented Redis caching, RabbitMQ messaging, MongoDB aggregations, AI-powered content rewriting, web scraping pipelines, and AWS S3 storage.

projects.title: Hotel POS System
projects.description: QR-based hotel POS platform with digital menus, kitchen order tracking, payment management, inventory control, analytics dashboards, PDF/Excel exports, and real-time revenue monitoring.

projects.title: SBlast App
projects.description: Offline-first React Native application for mine blasting operations with RealmDB synchronization, interactive borehole visualizations, blast charts, filtering, and reduced field data entry time.

projects.title: BTTN App
projects.description: Ride-hailing application supporting real-time ride assignments, live driver notifications, Google Maps integration, and real-time location updates with navigation support.

projects.title: AI Club
projects.description: Desktop productivity application allowing users to interact with multiple AI platforms through a single prompt and receive responses from all AI systems in parallel.

projects.title: Web Controls for Students
projects.description: Productivity-focused browser extension that enables dark mode for websites and videos, video playback controls up to 8x speed, and custom filters for an improved learning experience.

projects.title: YouTube Controls for Students
projects.description: Chrome extension for YouTube providing dark mode, advanced video playback controls, custom filters, and productivity enhancements tailored for students.

experience.description: Engineered React Native (Expo) applications and deployed React.js/Next.js web platforms, including admin panels and public-facing frontends. Architected backend microservices using Redis, Docker, AWS S3, and AI pipelines to automate scraping and rewriting automotive blogs/news content. Delivered data-driven web and mobile apps using REST APIs, RealmDB, and advanced MongoDB pipelines, reducing response time by 35%.

Applied feature engineering on datasets, boosting ML model accuracy by 70%. Enhanced ML model accuracy by 15% through data visualization and optimization techniques. Achieved a 90% precision rate while delivering all tasks ahead of project deadlines.

Performed data preprocessing, cleaning, and exploratory data analysis on real-world datasets. Developed machine learning models for predictive analysis and evaluated performance using key metrics. Built visualizations and generated actionable insights to support data-driven decision-making.

testimonials.quote: Islam delivered an exceptional product that exceeded our expectations. His attention to detail and technical expertise is remarkable.
testimonials.name: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: Working with Islam was a fantastic experience. He brought our vision to life with clean code and beautiful design.
testimonials.name: Alex Rivera

testimonials.quote: His AI/ML expertise combined with full-stack skills makes him a rare and valuable developer. Highly recommended.
testimonials.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
